zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Jordan於1534年出生在英國多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉時，他的父親Robert Jordan II34歲，母親Jane Coker34歲。他於1571年與Margaret Woolnough在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年7月19日在英國素福爾可維爾比享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉。

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, French (mainly Alsace and Haute-Savoie), Polish, Czech, and Slovenian; Spanish and Hungarian (Jordán): from the Christian personal name or nickname Jordan. This is taken from the name of the river Jordan (Hebrew Yarden, a derivative of yarad ‘to go down’, i.e. to the Dead Sea). At the time of the Crusades it was a common practice for crusaders and pilgrims to bring back flasks of water from the river in which John the Baptist had baptized people, including Christ himself, and to use it in the christening of their own children. As a result Jordan became quite a common personal name.

variants.name: Giordano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Antonio, Pasquale, Carmine, Vito, Domenic, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Giordano, an equivalent of Jordan .

variants.name: Jourdan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Gabrielle, Henri, Lucien, Pierre, Raoul, Yves.
English: variant of   Jordan  .
French (mainly southern): variant of   Jourdain  , a cognate of 2 below.

variants.name: Jourdain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Henri, Pierre, Fritz, Hans, Jacques, Rommel.
French, Breton (mainly Finistère), and West Indian (mainly Haiti, also Martinique and Dominican Republic): from the French personal name Jourdain, an equivalent of Jordan .
English (London, Derbyshire): French-influenced variant of   Jordan  ; compare 1 above.

variants.name: Jordison
meanings: English (North Yorkshire, Durham, and Northumberland): from a Middle English pet form, Jordi, of the male personal name Jordan + -son, or directly from a phonetic shortening of Jordanson.

variants.name: Jorden
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .
North German (mainly Jörden): probably a variant of Jordan . Compare Yerden and Yerdon .

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .
German: variant of   Jude  .

variants.name: Jorda
meanings: Catalan (Jordà): from the personal name Jordà (see Jordan ).

variants.name: Jerden
meanings: English: from a variant of the personal name Jurdon, an old form of Jordan .

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

variants.name: Jordon
meanings: English: variant of   Jordan  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Jordan was born in 1534, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, his father, Robert Jordan II, was 34 and his mother, Jane Coker, was 34. He married Margaret Woolnough in 1571, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 July 1603, in Wilby, Suffolk, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Jordan est né en 1534, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Robert Jordan II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jane Coker, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Woolnough en 1571, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1603, à Wilby, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Jordan 1534 in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Jordan II 34 und seine Mutter Jane Coker 34. Er hat 1571 in Suffolk, England Margaret Woolnough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1603 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Wilby, Suffolk, England und wurde in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Woolnough nel 1571, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Henry Jordanが1534年にイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスで生まれた時，父Robert Jordan IIは34歳，母Jane Cokerは34歳であった。1571年にイギリススフォルクでMargaret Woolnoughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年7月19日にイギリススフォルクウィルビーで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトメルコンベ レジスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Jordan(이)가 1534년 영국 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Jordan II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Coker(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1571년 영국 수폴크에서 Margaret Woolnough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 7월 19일 영국 수폴크 윌비에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Jordan nasceu em 1534, em Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Jordan II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jane Coker, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Woolnough em 1571, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1603, em Wilby, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Jordan родился в 1534 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Jordan II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Coker, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Woolnough в 1571 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 июля 1603 г. в местности уилби, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
